title: spergularia × pseudoazorica
intro: Spergularia × pseudoazorica, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Spergularia rubra and Spergularia marina, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Spergularia × pseudoazorica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
